verdicts.reason: Intra-tradition pairing within Fon cosmology itself — Mawu (moon) and Lisa (sun) are the two halves of the hyphenated androgynous creator Mawu-Lisa. This is not a cross-family linguistic claim but a complementary couple at the root of one system, the strongest and most secure kind of seam. Tier 1 stands.

Fon Legba and Yoruba Esu/Elegba are an attested shared/borrowed crossroads-trickster cult among directly neighbouring peoples (the Elegba~Legba name relation reflects real religious contact, not coincidence). Fon (Gbe/Kwa) and Yoruba (Yoruboid) are different sub-branches, so this is NOT a sound-law tier-1 cognate despite the seam label — but the documented regional cult-sharing legitimately supports tier 2 (attested).

Gu (Fon) and Ogun (Yoruba) are the same iron-and-war smith-god shared across the documented Fon–Yoruba religious frontier — a real, historically attested regional cult, not a distant structural analogy. Different sub-families rule out a true tier-1 cognate, but the documented contact/syncretism holds tier 2 (attested).

Xevioso/Heviosso (Fon) and Shango (Yoruba) are neighbouring thunder-gods sharing the stone-axe and lightning-judgement complex of an attested West-African storm cult with documented Fon–Yoruba contact. This is more than abstract analogy — it is regional cult-sharing/syncretism, so tier 2 (attested) is defensible rather than demoting to 3.
